feed.title: MSFS Blog
feed.subtitle: Development updates of Microsoft Flight Simulator.

entry.title: Developer Highlight: Taog’s Hangar and the UH-1H Huey
entry.summary: Few aircraft in aviation history are as instantly recognizable as the Bell UH-1H Huey. In Microsoft Flight Simulator 2024, this legendary helicopter is now taking to the skies in partnership with Taog’s Hangar, a developer known for high-fidelity, community-driven rotorcraft. Download the Stranger Things Expansion for FREE and fly the Huey through its dedicated missions … Continued

entry.title: Creator Highlight, January 2026 – CowTown
entry.summary: We’re continuing our Creator Highlight series in 2026 and are starting the new year in style, featuring popular YouTuber CowTown! Having started content creation a decade ago, CowTown (Tim) has switched his focus to Microsoft Flight Simulator in recent years. Sitting at just shy of 50’000 subscribers, Tim’s passion for our community shines through in … Continued

entry.title: Creator Highlight, February 2026 – FlyWithLado
entry.summary: For our February Creator Highlight, we’re focusing on popular video creator FlyWithLado! Having amassed a ginormous following of over 540,000 Instagram users and many more on different platforms, FlyWithLado is redefining content creation for social media in our community.We asked them some questions to give you all a behind the scenes look at their content:Do … Continued

entry.title: Sim Update 5 Beta Now Available | Microsoft Flight Simulator 2024
entry.summary: Welcome to the Microsoft Flight Simulator 2024 Sim Update 5 public beta test!The Sim Update 05 Beta is now available on Steam, Windows PC, and Xbox.The release notes for the first SU5 test build (1.7.6.0) can be found on our forums here.Changes to Career/Challenge League in the Sim Update 5 BetaJust like the recent Sim … Continued

entry.title: February 19th, 2026 MSFS Weekly Briefing
entry.summary: Weekly Recap The Sim Update 5 public beta test for Microsoft Flight Simulator 2024 began last week! In case you missed it, you can read the release notes for the first test build here. Thank you to everyone who is participating in the beta for your feedback and bug reports. If you do encounter any issues when … Continued

entry.title: February 26th, 2026 MSFS Weekly Briefing
entry.summary: Weekly Recap Public testing for Sim Update 5 remains ongoing. Last week we released a new beta build, 1.7.7.0, to volunteer testers from the community. You can read the release notes for this test build here. If you are not currently enrolled in the beta and would like to help assist the dev team by testing … Continued

entry.title: Microsoft Flight Simulator Releases Famous Flyer 13: The Northrop T-38A Talon
entry.summary: An iconic and historic performer, the T-38A provides pilots an exhilarating experience from take-off to landing.

entry.title: Microsoft Flight Simulator Releases City Update 13: California
entry.summary: Microsoft Flight Simulator Releases City Update 13: California
